steps.title: Spot the problem the method creates
steps.content: The but signals that the tracking method has a flaw. The passage states it results in incomplete maps—meaning sidewalks are being left unmapped. The specific sidewalks left out are those with few pedestrians.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Neglects means to overlook or fail to account for—the method neglects sidewalks with few pedestrians, explaining the incomplete maps. The other choices don't fit: detects would mean the method finds these sidewalks (contradicting incomplete maps), oversees implies supervision, and approves is meaningless in context. That matches choice A — A is correct.
